title: A Phase II Trial of Perioperative Camrelizumab Plus Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Resectable Stage IIB-IIIB Lung Squamous Cell Carcinoma.
snippet: This phase II trial investigated perioperative camrelizumab plus neoadjuvant chemotherapy for patients with stage IIB-IIIB lung squamous cell carcinoma (LUSC) and explored predictive biomarkers of treatment response. Patients received neoadjuvant camrelizumab (200 mg, Day 1) in combination with nab-paclitaxel (130 mg/m, Days 1 and 8) and carboplat...
